'''âm-v-j''' ('''kamavaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monophthongize|monophthongize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monophthongize|monophthongize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kamavaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavaj|thimavaj]] || [[word:jimavaj|jimavaj]] || [[word:shimavaj|shimavaj]] || [[word:kimavaj|kimavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavaj|thuthumavaj]] || [[word:jujumavaj|jujumavaj]] || [[word:shushumavaj|shushumavaj]] || [[word:kukumavaj|kukumavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavaj|thumavaj]] || [[word:jumavaj|jumavaj]] || [[word:shumavaj|shumavaj]] || [[word:kumavaj|kumavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavaj|thumavaj]] || [[word:jumavaj|jumavaj]] || [[word:shumavaj|shumavaj]] || [[word:kumavaj|kumavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themavaj|themavaj]] || [[word:jemavaj|jemavaj]] || [[word:shemavaj|shemavaj]] || [[word:kemavaj|kemavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavaj|thothomavaj]] || [[word:jojomavaj|jojomavaj]] || [[word:shoshomavaj|shoshomavaj]] || [[word:kokomavaj|kokomavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavaj|thomavaj]] || [[word:jomavaj|jomavaj]] || [[word:shomavaj|shomavaj]] || [[word:komavaj|komavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavaj|thomavaj]] || [[word:jomavaj|jomavaj]] || [[word:shomavaj|shomavaj]] || [[word:komavaj|komavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmavaj|thĂŠmavaj]] || [[word:jĂŠmavaj|jĂŠmavaj]] || [[word:shĂŠmavaj|shĂŠmavaj]] || [[word:kĂŠmavaj|kĂŠmavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavaj|thathamavaj]] || [[word:jajamavaj|jajamavaj]] || [[word:shashamavaj|shashamavaj]] || [[word:kakamavaj|kakamavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavaj|thamavaj]] || [[word:jamavaj|jamavaj]] || [[word:shamavaj|shamavaj]] || [[word:kamavaj|kamavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavaj|thamavaj]] || [[word:jamavaj|jamavaj]] || [[word:shamavaj|shamavaj]] || [[word:kamavaj|kamavaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamavaj|shamavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamavaj|goshamavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamavaj|gokishamavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamavajnĂŒ|shamavajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamavajnknĂŒ|goshamavajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavajnĂŒ|gokishamavajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamavajshĂ«|shamavajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamavajnkshĂ«|goshamavajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamavajshĂ«|gokishamavajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavajro|shamavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavajnkro|goshamavajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavajro|gokishamavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavajmu|shamavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavajnkmu|goshamavajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavajmu|gokishamavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamavajsher|shamavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamavajnksher|goshamavajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamavajsher|gokishamavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamavajng|shamavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamavajnkng|goshamavajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamavajng|gokishamavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamavajya|shamavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamavajnkya|goshamavajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamavajya|gokishamavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamavajyam|shamavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamavajnkyam|goshamavajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamavajyam|gokishamavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavajnĂŒshĂ«|shamavajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamavajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamavajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavajnĂŒro|shamavajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavajnknĂŒro|goshamavajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavajnĂŒro|gokishamavajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavajnĂŒmu|shamavajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavajnknĂŒmu|goshamavajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavajnĂŒmu|gokishamavajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavajshĂ«nĂŒ|shamavajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamavajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamavajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavajshĂ«ro|shamavajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavajnkshĂ«ro|goshamavajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavajshĂ«ro|gokishamavajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavajshĂ«mu|shamavajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavajnkshĂ«mu|goshamavajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavajshĂ«mu|gokishamavajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavajronĂŒ|shamavajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavajnkronĂŒ|goshamavajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavajronĂŒ|gokishamavajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavajroshĂ«|shamavajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavajnkroshĂ«|goshamavajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavajroshĂ«|gokishamavajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavajromu|shamavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavajnkromu|goshamavajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavajromu|gokishamavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavajmunĂŒ|shamavajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavajnkmunĂŒ|goshamavajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavajmunĂŒ|gokishamavajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavajmushĂ«|shamavajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavajnkmushĂ«|goshamavajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavajmushĂ«|gokishamavajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavajmuro|shamavajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavajnkmuro|goshamavajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavajmuro|gokishamavajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
